title: GenAI Gateway: LLM Jailbreak Detected (AML.T0054)
description: Detects jailbreak attempts at the GenAI/LLM inference gateway. Fires when the guardrail classifies a request as a jailbreak or sets the jailbreak flag (DAN, developer mode, unrestricted roleplay), ranking caller identity, API key, source IP, and model. MITRE ATLAS AML.T0054 (LLM Jailbreak).
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC GenAI Gateway Logs' and ('Guardrail Category' = 'jailbreak' or 'Jailbreak Detected' = 'true') | stats count as Hits, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Sessions, max('Prompt Risk Score') as MaxRisk by 'GenAI Identity', 'API Key ID', 'Client IP' | sort -Hits
